title: CIE Analysis Request (Intent Object)
description: Schema for the structured Intent Object produced by the Planner Agent and consumed by the Statistics Agent. Conforms to planner.yaml output_schema.guaranteed.intent_object and component-model.md Intent Layer output example.

confidence_score.description: Planner confidence in the extracted intent. Below 0.7 should trigger clarification.

requires_human_clarification.description: True when intent is ambiguous. Pipeline must pause for human input before Statistics Agent proceeds.

clarification_options.description: Mutually exclusive analytical paths presented to the human when requires_human_clarification=true. Conforms to planner.yaml rule PL-003.

label.description: Human-readable description of this analytical path.

intent_override.description: Partial intent_object fields that would be applied if this option is selected.

IntentObject.description: Structured clinical research intent. Derived from natural language by Planner Agent per rule PL-002.

objective.description: Primary analytical objective. Maps directly to statistics.yaml method_selection_framework.

outcome_type.description: Statistical type of the primary outcome variable.

predictor_type.description: Statistical type of the primary predictor or grouping variable.

study_design.description: Inferred clinical study design. Used by Reporting Agent for checklist selection.

outcome_variables.description: var_n aliases for primary and secondary outcome variables.

predictor_variables.description: var_n aliases for predictor, grouping, or covariate variables.

sample_size_estimate.description: Estimated total sample size derived from dataset_structural_metadata row_count.

distribution_assumptions.description: Initial distribution assumption. Overridden by Statistics Agent assumption_check results.

reporting_checklist_inference.description: Checklist inferred from study_design. Passed to Reporting Agent.

natural_language_summary.description: One-sentence plain-language summary of the interpreted research objective for human review.
